pi_items.source: Task description (task.json line 5: 'Name: High Value Purchase') and iDempiere Alert window documentation
Task description (task.json line 5: 'Alert Subject: Review Invoice > 1000') and Alert wiki documentation confirming AlertSubject field stores email subject

Task description SQL: 'SELECT * FROM C_Invoice WHERE IsSOTrx='N' AND DocStatus='CO' AND GrandTotal > 1000'. Verified against iDempiere C_Invoice table schema. IsSOTrx='N' means vendor transaction (purchase invoice). DocStatus='CO' means completed status per Hackers Guide to Documents. GrandTotal is valid C_Invoice field for monetary thresholds.
iDempiere Login Help wiki and GardenWorld documentation confirm GardenAdmin is a real user with admin privileges in GardenWorld demo database. Default credentials: GardenAdmin/GardenAdmin.

privileged_info_summary: Task configures an iDempiere Alert named 'High Value Purchase' with subject 'Review Invoice > 1000'. The alert triggers on completed vendor invoices (IsSOTrx='N', DocStatus='CO') exceeding 1000 currency units (GrandTotal > 1000). Alert recipient is GardenAdmin, a real administrative user in the iDempiere GardenWorld demo database. All metadata claims match task.json description and are consistent with iDempiere Alert/AD_Alert system and C_Invoice table structure.
